channel.title: Gravel God — Race Database
channel.description: 735 gravel races rated and ranked on 14 criteria. Tier ratings, scores, locations, dates, and course details.

item.title: Transcontinental Race — Tier 1, 97/100
item.description:
Tier 1 — Score: 97/100
Location: Across Europe (route changes annually)
Date: 2026: July 19 (Trondheim, Norway to Kalamata, Greece)
Distance: 3100 miles
Elevation: 210,000 ft
4,000-5,000km self-supported across Europe. The clock never stops. The ultimate test of human endurance, navigation, and self-reliance.

item.title: Tour Divide — Tier 1, 94/100
item.description:
Tier 1 — Score: 94/100
Location: Banff, Alberta to Antelope Wells, New Mexico
Date: 2026: Friday, June 12th at 8AM
Distance: 2745 miles
Elevation: 200,000 ft
2,745 miles from Banff to Mexico. The longest mountain bike time trial on earth. Self-supported. Unsupported. Unforgettable.

item.title: Unbound Gravel 200 — Tier 1, 93/100
item.description:
Tier 1 — Score: 93/100
Location: Emporia, Kansas
Date: 2026: May 30
Distance: 200 miles
Elevation: 11,000 ft
The Super Bowl of gravel. 200 miles through Kansas Flint Hills. Where legends are made and dreams die in the dust.

item.title: The Traka 200 — Tier 1, 91/100
item.description:

Location: Girona, Catalonia, Spain

Distance: 126 miles
Elevation: 8,694 ft
Europe's Unbound, one-day distance. 202km through Catalonia's Empordà plains and Gavarres massif, out and back to Girona in a day.

item.title: Haute Route Dolomites — Tier 1, 83/100
item.description:

Date: 2026: DISCONTINUED. Haute Route collapsed to Alps-only since 2025 (now run by French Velo Evenements/FVE). Dolomites edition last ran in 2023.
Distance: 280 miles
Elevation: 47,572 ft
450 kilometers and 14,500 meters of climbing across 5 stages through the Italian Dolomites and Alps — Stelvio, Gavia, Pordoi, and the jagged spires of UNESCO World Heritage mountains. Professional stage-race format for amateur cyclists who want to suffer like the pros.

item.title: Wild Horse Gravel — Tier 3, 50/100
item.description:
Tier 3 — Score: 50/100
Location: De Beque, Colorado (High Lonesome Ranch Basecamp)
Date: 2027: May 15 (Saturday-pattern estimate, NOT an officially confirmed date — verified 2026-07-16). RE-CONFIRMED on geminiadventures.com/bike/wild-horse-gravel: 'New for 2027! Free camping just steps away from the start line! 3 new courses and distances. Mustang-100 miles, Gunslinger-75 miles, Hoedown-30 miles' — but the same page also states 'New courses will be announced soon,' meaning full routes/elevation gain are NOT yet published. Distances above (100/75/30mi) are the confirmed 2027 announcement; elevation is 'Varies' until the organizer publishes route detail. The 65/46/30-mile / 5,500ft config elsewhere in this profile is the FINAL 2026 layout (confirmed via geminiadventures.com, BikeReg, Trailforks, granfondoguide, Bicycle Colorado — race ran/was scheduled Saturday, May 16, 2026) — it is retired and must not be reused for 2027 marketing.
Distance: 100 miles
Elevation: Varies ft
Private-ranch gravel through the Book Cliffs — roads closed to the public every other day of the year.
